name: Discord
description: Send and receive Discord messages. Triggers on @alto mentions.

trigger.description: A Discord message that mentions Alto or replies to Alto.

functions.name: discord_send_message
functions.description: Send a message to a Discord channel.

channel_id.description: The Discord channel ID to send the message to.

settings_schema.label: Bot Token
settings_schema.description: Discord bot token. Set in server .env file.

settings_schema.label: Allowed User IDs
settings_schema.description: Discord user IDs that can trigger Alto.
